case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS IVORY, PANCIE HATTIE AKA PANCIE HATTIE HARRIS

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-04-1994, GRANTED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $914.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT IVORY, PANCIE HATTIE AKA PANCIE HATTIE HARRIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT IVORY, PANCIE HATTIE AKA PANCIE HATTIE HARRIS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT IVORY, PANCIE HATTIE AKA PANCIE HATTIE HARRIS HEARING SET FOR JAN-04-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IVORY, PANCIE HATTIE AKA PANCIE HATTIE HARRIS $814.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $834.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT IVORY, PANCIE HATTIE AKA PANCIE HATTIE HARRIS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
